AP.name: Push — Partnering Strength
AP.fullName: Day Push — Overhead Strength & Shoulder Health

warmup.name: Thoracic Extension — Table Slides
warmup.note: Kneel at bench, arms on surface, sit back driving chest toward floor. Targets t-spine mobility needed for safe overhead press.

warmup.name: Shoulder CARs
warmup.note: Full circumduction in the shoulder joint — largest pain-free circle possible. Slow and controlled throughout.

warmup.name: Banded Pull-Aparts
warmup.note: Band at chest height, arms straight. Squeeze scapulae at end range. Activates posterior rotator cuff before pressing.

warmup.name: Scapular Push-Up
warmup.note: Plank position, protract and retract scapulae without bending elbows. Serratus anterior activation.

warmup.name: Wall Slide Activation
warmup.note: Forearms against wall, slide upward maintaining contact. Same scapular path as overhead press lockout.

exercises.name: Overhead Barbell Press
exercises.note: Primary partnering lift. Full lockout at top. First — highest CNS demand and most ballet-specific pressing pattern.

exercises.name: Weighted Dips
exercises.note: Triceps lockout and chest depth. Complements OHP — same lockout pattern reinforced while still fresh.

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.note: Horizontal pressing volume. Adds chest mass and anterior shoulder strength for partnering endurance. Placed third — primary overhead and lockout patterns are trained first. Full range of motion, controlled 2-sec lower.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Single-Arm DB Press
exercises.note: Kneeling removes leg drive — pure unilateral shoulder stability. Log right and left separately. Identifies and addresses side asymmetries in overhead strength.

exercises.name: Lateral Raises (strict)
exercises.note: Lateral deltoid development. Slow lower — no swinging. Finishing exercise: shoulder width and definition support stage presence and overhead line.

exercises.name: Serratus Wall Slides
exercises.note: Scapular control and serratus anterior activation. Never skip — direct shoulder injury prevention regardless of weekly load. Slide arms up wall maintaining full contact.

AL.name: Pull — Lifting Mechanics
AL.fullName: Day Pull — Power, Back Strength & Arm Development

warmup.name: Dead Hang
warmup.note: Full shoulder decompression. Lat and shoulder capsule stretch before loading. Release grip slowly.

warmup.name: Band Pull-Apart
warmup.note: Targets the same posterior chain used in hang clean pull and face pulls.

warmup.name: Hip Hinge Activation — Empty Bar
warmup.note: RDL pattern with empty bar. Grooves the hip hinge before loading the hang clean pull.

warmup.name: Wrist / Grip CARs
warmup.note: Wrist circles, flexion/extension, radial/ulnar deviation. Prepares elbow flexors for bicep curls and grip for pull-ups.

warmup.name: Scapular Depression Drill
warmup.note: Hanging from bar, depress scapulae without bending elbows. Prepares lat activation for pull-ups.

exercises.name: Hang Clean Pull
exercises.note: Explosive hip extension into shrug. No catch — stop at top of pull. Full intent every rep. ALWAYS first while CNS is freshest.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-Ups
exercises.note: Dead hang to chin over bar. Full ROM every rep. Primary lat and upper back strength — direct carryover to lifting and holding a partner.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row (1-sec pause)
exercises.note: 1-sec hold at chest. Elbows drive back. Mid-back thickness and scapular retraction strength.

exercises.name: Face Pulls
exercises.note: Rope at eye height. External rotate at end — hands finish by ears. Rear deltoid and external rotator health. Counterbalances pressing volume.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
exercises.note: Supinated grip, full range of motion — full extension at bottom, peak contraction at top. Alternate arms or both together. Elbow flexor mass supports partnering endurance. Placed last — accessory work after all primary pulling is complete.

AF.name: Full Body — Upper
AF.fullName: Day Full Body — Compressed Upper (Constrained Week)

warmup.name: Thoracic Extension — Table Slides
warmup.note: Compresses both push and pull warm-up needs into one movement.

warmup.name: Scapular Push-Up
warmup.note: Serratus activation before combined push/pull session.

warmup.name: Dead Hang
warmup.note: Lat decompression before pull-ups.

B.name: Lower Body & Trunk
B.fullName: Day B — Lower Body Strength, Turnout & Trunk

warmup.name: Hip 90/90 Mobility
warmup.note: Seated on floor, both knees at 90°. Rotate torso toward front shin, hold end range. Directly prepares hip external rotators for cable HER.

warmup.name: Deep Hip External Rotation Stretch
warmup.note: Figure-4 or pigeon position. Targets piriformis and short rotators — the same muscles trained with cable HER.

warmup.name: Glute Bridge
warmup.note: Drive hips to full extension, 2-sec hold at top. Glute activation before RDL and BSS.

warmup.name: Single-Leg Hip Hinge — Bodyweight
warmup.note: RDL pattern on one leg, no weight. Rehearses balance and posterior chain control needed for BSS.

warmup.name: Slow Calf Raises
warmup.note: Eccentric emphasis. Achilles and plantar fascia preparation before tibialis finisher.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.note: Hip hinge — feel hamstring stretch at bottom. Stop when lower back rounds. Bar stays close to legs.

exercises.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
exercises.note: 3-sec eccentric lower to floor. Partner holds ankles. Gold standard hamstring injury prevention. Never dropped regardless of load.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.note: Rear foot elevated on bench. Upright torso. Feel front glute loading. Log right and left separately.

exercises.name: Hip External Rotation (cable)
exercises.note: Seated or side-lying, cable at ankle. Rotate leg outward against resistance. Targets piriformis and short external rotators — direct turnout support.

exercises.name: Copenhagen Plank
exercises.note: Top leg on bench, bottom leg lifted. Adductor and groin protection.

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.note: Press straight out from chest — resist rotating toward cable.

exercises.name: Tibialis Raises + Foot Intrinsics
exercises.note: Tibialis raises: heels on raised surface, raise toes 20 times — full range, controlled. Then 10 short-foot arch lifts per foot. Achilles and plantar fascia protection. Count reps, not time.

warmup.name: Ankle Circles + Mobilisation
warmup.note: Full circumduction. Cold ankles are the primary injury site in plyometric sessions. Never skip.

warmup.name: Calf Raises — Double then Single-Leg
warmup.note: Progressive achilles loading. Transition to single-leg mirrors takeoff mechanics.

warmup.name: Sub-maximal Pogos
warmup.note: Rhythm-based, no height intent. Activates the stretch-shortening cycle without fatiguing it. Never skip before approach jumps.

warmup.name: Broad Jump Landing Practice
warmup.note: Jump from standing, land softly, hold 2 sec. No distance intent. Rehearses deceleration before full output.

warmup.name: Approach Run-Up Strides
warmup.note: Run the full 3–5 step approach at 80% speed — stop at takeoff point. Grooves the pattern before maximum vertical effort.

exercises.name: Approach Vertical Jump
exercises.note: 3–5 step approach, maximum intent every rep. Closest gym analogue to grand jeté and tour en l'air takeoff. ALWAYS first — highest CNS demand in this program. Measure peak height, track over time. Step down between reps, never drop.

exercises.name: Depth Drop → Reactive Vertical
exercises.note: Step off box (40–60cm), land and immediately jump maximum vertical. Trains the stretch-shortening cycle at near-maximum intensity. Ground contact minimal — land-and-explode, not absorb-then-jump.

exercises.name: Single-Leg Box Jump
exercises.note: Most ballet-specific exercise in the program. Mirrors the asymmetric single-leg takeoff of assemblé, sissone, and grand allegro. Log right and left separately — asymmetries are clinically relevant.

exercises.name: Lateral Bound → Stick
exercises.note: Maximum lateral distance, stick landing for 2 seconds. Trains lateral acceleration found in manège and grand allegro. Develops hip abductor power supporting turnout under load.

exercises.name: Repeated Broad Jump Series
exercises.note: Continuous horizontal projection — land and immediately jump forward. Record total series distance. Trains posterior chain drive relevant to ballon in allegro sequences.

exercises.name: Pogos
exercises.note: Tendon conditioning finisher only. Stiff ankle spring, minimal knee bend, fast rhythm. Low RPE by design — if effort feels above 6, reduce reps. Achilles and plantar fascia protection.

warmup.name: Arm Circles
warmup.note: Forward and backward. Shoulder joint circulation before pressing.

warmup.name: Incline Push-Up
warmup.note: Sub-maximal pressing activation. Hands on bench, full range of motion.

warmup.name: Chin-Up Negative
warmup.note: Jump to top position, lower slowly. Activates biceps and lower lat before chin-up sets.

exercises.name: Chin-Ups
exercises.note: Supinated (underhand) grip. Full ROM — dead hang to chin over bar. Shifts emphasis to lower lat and biceps.

exercises.name: Hammer Curls + Rope Pushdowns
exercises.note: Superset: curls into pushdowns immediately. Rest after both.

poor_sleep.label: Poor sleep
poor_sleep.note: Reduce plyometric volume by 1 set. Strength work unchanged — sleep debt impairs reactive power more than strength.

high_fatigue.label: High fatigue
high_fatigue.note: Drop 1 set from each exercise. Keep prescribed RPE — the load is appropriate, the volume is reduced.

low_energy.label: Low energy
low_energy.note: Cap all exercises at RPE 7. Volume unchanged — energy will build through the session.

heavy_legs.label: Heavy legs
heavy_legs.note: Reduce lower body and plyo by 1 set. Upper body unchanged.

upper_soreness.label: Upper body soreness
upper_soreness.note: Reduce upper body and carries by 1 set. Soreness is safe to train through — scapular work is maintained.

hip_knee.label: Hip / knee tightness
hip_knee.note: Shorten ROM on lower body exercises. Reduce plyo by 1 set — prioritise landing over height.

shoulder.label: Shoulder tightness
shoulder.note: Reduce pressing load 10–15%. Pull-ups bodyweight only. Serratus and scapular work maintained.

dull_ache.label: Dull joint ache
dull_ache.note: Monitor during warm-up. Skip that movement if ache increases. Log location in injury log.

sharp_pain.label: Sharp / acute pain
sharp_pain.note: Do not train through sharp pain. Requires physiotherapist assessment before next session.
